meta.title: WOOdrobe — try the styles
meta.description: A fresh WordPress + WooCommerce site with WOOdrobe pre-installed and a sample product. Lands in the Site Editor on the Single Product template so you can swap WOOdrobe variants from the Styles panel.
meta.author: Regionally Famous

options.blogdescription: A wardrobe of block-style outfits for WooCommerce blocks

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

if ( ! class_exists( 'WooCommerce' ) ) {
    return;
}

$existing = get_page_by_path( 'beanie', OBJECT, 'product' );
if ( $existing instanceof WP_Post ) {
    return;
}

$post_id = wp_insert_post( array(
    'post_title'   => 'Beanie',
    'post_name'    => 'beanie',
    'post_status'  => 'publish',
    'post_type'    => 'product',
    'post_content' => 'Hand-finished in small batches from full-grain merino wool. Each piece develops a unique patina with use — softening at the edges and deepening in tone over the first few months of wear.

Stitched with waxed Tiger thread and finished with a brushed-felt brim. Designed to last decades, not seasons.',
    'post_excerpt' => 'Soft, hand-knit, ready for a chilly day.',
) );

if ( ! $post_id || is_wp_error( $post_id ) ) {
    return;
}

wp_set_object_terms( $post_id, 'simple', 'product_type' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_sku',           'woo-beanie' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_regular_price', '20' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_sale_price',    '18' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_price',         '18' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_stock_status',  'instock' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_visibility',    'visible' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_weight',        '0.2' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_length',        '21' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_width',         '11' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_height',        '2' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_manage_stock',  'no' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_virtual',       'no' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_downloadable',  'no' );
update_post_meta( $post_id, '_featured',      'no' );
